english: A dry length of wood collected from bushes and shrubbery.
Plant fibres twisted together into a crude binding material.
A sturdy branch cut from a tree using the Crude Axe.
Thick bark stripped from a tree using the Crude Axe.
A fractured piece of stone with a usable cutting edge.
A primitive axe made from rope, sticks and stone. It can strip bark and cut branches from trees.
A long branch tipped with sharp stone and secured with fibre rope.
Overlapping bark panels protecting the body.
Crude bark guards protecting the hands.
Layered bark and fibre bindings protecting the feet.
A fragmented transmission containing the final survival protocol.
A sealed metallic core pawned to the trader by a vanished scavenger. It remained inert until you approached and now emits a slow emerald pulse.
A rough receiver assembled from scavenged components. It is designed to isolate and trace the signal emitted by the Dormant Helix Core.
Consciousness returns in fragments. Gather plant fibres, sticks and small stones from the surrounding area.
Twist gathered plant fibres into crude rope.
Combine rope, sticks and stone to construct a crude axe.
Use the Crude Axe to cut branches and strip bark from trees. Recover sharp stone while mining. Construct a Crude Pike and a complete set of bark armour, then equip every piece.
Craft any available bedroll colour and place it, then craft and place a campfire to establish a temporary shelter.
Eliminate five infected entities to demonstrate basic combat readiness.
The survival transmission has identified a nearby survivor outpost. Reach the trader and establish contact.

Hold on... that thing is reacting to you. Some scavenger pawned it here months ago and claimed he found it inside an underground facility. It has been dead ever since. Then you walk in and it starts lighting up. You are not the first person it has done this to... and I doubt you will be the last. Take it. Just be careful what you wake up.

The core reacted to your presence but remains sealed. Its emerald pulse repeats in a deliberate pattern. Assemble a crude signal reader from scavenged electrical and mechanical components and determine what it is transmitting.
